notes: Playwright MCP unavailable. Static code analysis used per LEARNINGS.md pattern. 8 key files read and verified against acceptance criteria.

criteria_results.criterion: BUG-021 fix: workspace-shell route exclusion list contains all non-canvas segments
criteria_results.evidence: workspace-shell.tsx:47 exclusion array contains all 11 segments: ['teams','people','tools','settings','list','gap-analysis','compare','comments','dashboard','runbooks','activity']. urlTabId correctly returns null for all non-canvas routes.

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook acceptance: fixed overlay (z-50), Mark Complete & Next advances, Skip button, dot navigation, progress bar, max-w-xl, URL-shareable
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx: fixed inset-0 z-50 confirmed (line 122). handleMarkComplete finds next pending/in_progress step via findIndex (lines 59-63). Skip button present (lines 201-209). Dot navigation buttons with aria-label (lines 243-257). Progress bar: resolvedCount/total * 100 where resolvedCount = completedCount + skippedCount (lines 34-37) — matches spec. Progress text: '{resolvedCount} of {total} resolved' (line 259). max-w-xl on content container (line 152). URL uses /runbooks/{id}/playbook path.

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook: read-only mode for completed/cancelled runbooks
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx:42 isReadOnly = runbook.status !== 'active'. Action buttons (Mark Complete & Skip) gated on !isReadOnly (line 190). Prev/Next navigation still available in read-only mode.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity acceptance: action type filter tabs, Load More pagination, skeleton placeholders, entity links navigate correctly, user email (not 'Unknown')
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx: ALL_ACTIONS filter tabs rendered (lines 119-132). loadMore() fetches with offset (lines 81-93). Skeleton placeholders while loading=true (lines 183-191). Entity links use entityTabMap for tab navigation (line 166). email display: entry.users?.email ?? 'Unknown' (line 176) — correct join path; 'Unknown' is fallback only for deleted users.

criteria_results.criterion: Clone acceptance: clone_workspace() RPC, API route POST /workspaces/[id]/clone, Duplicate Workspace button with Radix Dialog confirmation, logActivity called
criteria_results.evidence: clone/route.ts: supabase.rpc('clone_workspace') called (line 18). Settings page: 'Duplicate Workspace' button (settings/page.tsx:247-251). Radix Dialog with DialogTitle and DialogDescription (lines 268-285). logActivity() called with action:'created', entity_type:'workspaces', details:{cloned_from:id} (clone/route.ts:43-52). cloneWorkspace() client function used (settings/page.tsx:146).

criteria_results.criterion: Coloring acceptance: CRUD (create/update/delete), has_role disabled (BUG-020 fix), active toggle, paintbrush button in canvas toolbar
criteria_results.evidence: coloring-panel.tsx: createColoringRule/updateColoringRule/deleteColoringRule all wired (lines 79, 99, 107). BUG-020 fix confirmed: has_role option has disabled:true (CRITERIA_OPTIONS line 24). Toggle switch with aria-label (lines 253-267). HEX validation (#RRGGBB regex) on both add and edit. Position appended as rules.length on create (line 85). Paintbrush button presence in canvas toolbar not verified in this pass (flow-canvas.tsx not read — see deferred checks).

criteria_results.criterion: Templates acceptance: STARTER_TEMPLATES constant (4 hardcoded templates), code structure
criteria_results.evidence: lib/templates.ts: STARTER_TEMPLATES array has exactly 4 entries: 'Customer Onboarding' (Customer Success), 'Support Ticket' (Support), 'Content Creation' (Marketing), 'Lead Nurturing' (Sales). Each has section.name, steps array with 5 steps, connections:[], step_roles:[]. makeSteps() helper generates correct position_x spacing (50 + i * 200). DB operations blocked pending migration 020 push — code structure only tested per spec.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() calls present in POST/PATCH/DELETE routes — spot-check
criteria_results.evidence: steps/route.ts line 4 imports logActivity. clone/route.ts line 4 imports logActivity and calls it. Both routes use the standard pattern: void logActivity({supabase, workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name}). 10+ route spot-check limited to 2 routes due to action budget — see deferred checks.
EXECUTION_PLAN.json validation block: compilation_status='passing', last_commit_valid=true, revert_needed=false. No new TypeScript errors per planner assessment.

criteria_results.criterion: Comments, Tasks, Runbooks acceptance criteria (full CRUD + UI states)
criteria_results.evidence: PARTIAL VERIFICATION: comment-panel.tsx, task-panel.tsx, runbook-view.tsx, comments-view.tsx, runbooks-list-view.tsx not read within action budget. Based on prior iteration 87/91/97 acceptance reports these features were confirmed passing. No regression or new bugs reported in EXECUTION_PLAN. Accepting on prior iteration baseline per LEARNINGS.md note.

quality_gate.notes: 1 known accessibility issue = BUG-024 (section-detail-panel DialogTitle, P2, pre-existing). Not a blocker per special_instructions.

bugs_found.description: BUG-024 (pre-existing, known): section-detail-panel Dialog is missing a visible DialogTitle, triggering Radix accessibility warning. Same root cause as BUG-023 (now fixed). Noted as open P2 in EXECUTION_PLAN.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open any workspace canvas. 2. Click a section header. 3. Section detail panel opens as a Dialog. 4. Check browser console for Radix DialogTitle warning.

improvements_found.observation: Activity entries show 'Unknown' when users join is null (deleted user accounts). The fallback covers the error case but 'Deleted User' would be more informative than 'Unknown' for audit trail purposes.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — user should understand why authorship is unavailable
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Change fallback from '"Unknown"' to '"[Deleted User]"' in activity-view.tsx:176 to distinguish between missing data and an actual unknown state.

improvements_found.observation: Playbook has no notes/description panel for the current step. Users may need step context (executor, notes) during execution without having to exit the playbook to the step detail panel.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — important step context shouldn't require navigation away
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add an optional collapsible 'Step Notes' section below the step name showing the step's notes field if present.

improvements_found.observation: ArrowLeft icon in playbook Exit link has aria-label='Back' redundant with visible 'Exit' text. Multiple ChevronLeft/Right icons also have aria-labels that duplicate adjacent text.
improvements_found.design_principle: WCAG 2.5.3 Label in Name — duplicate labeling can confuse screen readers
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Remove aria-label from decorative icons that are adjacent to visible text labels. Use aria-hidden='true' on purely decorative icons.

improvements_found.observation: Duplicate Workspace confirmation dialog does not display the workspace name in the dialog body. For users with many workspaces, it's unclear which workspace is being duplicated.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H5: Error prevention — confirm destructive/heavy operations with entity name
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Include workspace.name in the DialogDescription: 'A full copy of "{workspace.name}" will be created...'.

deferred_checks: flow-canvas.tsx: paintbrush toolbar button presence and 15% opacity tint rendering — not read within budget
step-node.tsx / section-node.tsx: TaskCountsContext and CommentCountsContext badge rendering — not read within budget
comment-panel.tsx: threading, category filter, resolve action — accepted on iteration 87 baseline
task-panel.tsx: completion toggle, reorder position field — accepted on iteration 87 baseline
runbook-view.tsx: 4-state transitions, Complete/Cancel Radix Dialog, progress bar — accepted on iteration 91 baseline
runbooks-list-view.tsx: filter tabs — accepted on iteration 91 baseline
logActivity() 10+ route spot-check: only 2 routes confirmed (steps, clone) — further sampling recommended
Migration 020: not pushed — templates feature end-to-end DB flow untestable until human runs npx supabase db push
